statements.impact_statement: The commit version of the dependency in use doesn't have the vulnerable code
Harvester doesn't use the Rancher login component.
The commit version of the dependency in use doesn't have the vulnerable code
Harvester uses Rancher as a client-side Go package to invoke Rancher/Cattle API. It doesn't expose the Rancher management plane.

This vulnerability is a runtime exploit on live virtual machines with active guest agent running. The kubevirt.io/kubevirt package is a transitive dependency from the github.com/harvester/harvester package, which Harvester components uses only for a handful of Go util functions.

This vulnerability is a runtime exploit on live virtual machines with active guest agent running. The kubevirt.io/kubevirt package is a transitive dependency from the github.com/harvester/harvester package, which Harvester components uses only for a handful of Go util functions.
This CVE only affects Windows and binaries that rely on Docker's pluging manager
